spec.legendFormat: Swap- Memory which is used for swap space
Active - Memory which cant be reclaimed.
Inactive - Memory which is eligible be reclaimed.

matcher.options: Swap- Memory which is used for swap space
Active - Memory which cant be reclaimed.
Inactive - Memory which is eligible be reclaimed.

spec.title: Firesystem Used Percent
spec.description: Disk space used of all filesystems mounted

spec.legendFormat: System - Processes executing in kernel mode
User - Normal processes executing in user mode
Iowait - Waiting for I/O to complete
Steal - Time spent in other operating systems when running in a virtualized environment
Idle - Waiting for something to happen

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen
Iowait - Waiting for I/O to complete
Nice - Niced processes executing in user mode
Steal - Time spent in other operating systems when running in a virtualized environment
System - Processes executing in kernel mode
User - Normal processes executing in user mode

spec.title: Disk R/W Data
spec.description: The number of bytes read from or written to the device per second

spec.title: CPU Use Per-Process
spec.description: Top 10 processes by CPU % of total system CPU, instant snapshot.

spec.title: Mem Use Per-Process
spec.description: Top 10 processes by resident memory % of total, instant snapshot.

spec.expr:
100 * (
  topk(
    10,
    sum by (process_name) (
      macos_process_resident_memory_bytes
    )
    /
    scalar(
      node_memory_active_bytes
      +
      node_memory_wired_bytes
      +
      node_memory_inactive_bytes
      +
      node_memory_purgeable_bytes
      +
      node_memory_free_bytes
    )
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    (
      sum(
        sum by (process_name) (
          macos_process_resident_memory_bytes
        )
        /
        scalar(
          node_memory_active_bytes
          +
          node_memory_wired_bytes
          +
          node_memory_inactive_bytes
          +
          node_memory_purgeable_bytes
          +
          node_memory_free_bytes
        )
      )
      -
      sum(
        topk(
          10,
          sum by (process_name) (
            macos_process_resident_memory_bytes
          )
          /
          scalar(
            node_memory_active_bytes
            +
            node_memory_wired_bytes
            +
            node_memory_inactive_bytes
            +
            node_memory_purgeable_bytes
            +
            node_memory_free_bytes
          )
        )
      )
    ),
    "process_name", "Other", "", ""
  )
)

spec.title: CPU Per-Process Over Time
spec.description: Top 10 processes by CPU over time.

spec.title: Memory Per-Process Over Time
spec.description: Top 10 processes by resident memory — reveals spikes not visible in the current-value bargauge.

spec.title: CPU - % Share of Used Over Time

spec.expr: (sum by (process_name) (macos_process_cpu_percent) / scalar(count(count by (cpu) (node_cpu_seconds_total)))) and topk(10, avg_over_time((sum by (process_name) (macos_process_cpu_percent))[$__range:$__interval]))

spec.title: Memory - % Share of Used Over Time

spec.expr: sum by (process_name) (macos_process_resident_memory_bytes) and topk(10, avg_over_time((sum by (process_name) (macos_process_resident_memory_bytes))[$__range:$__interval]))

spec.title: Disk Wait Time
spec.description: The average time for requests issued to the device to be served. This includes the time spent by the requests in queue and the time spent servicing them.
